CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2014 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2014 Continued To Jul-16-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Donnellan, Esq., 415.357.2099, for defendants Pamela Palpallatoc, James Gleed, Francis Law and San Francisco Housing Authority; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS PAMELA PALPALLATOC, JAMES GLEED, FRANCIS LAW, SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 15 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Donnellan, Esq., 415.357.2099, for defendants Pamela Palpallatoc, James Gleed, Francis Law and San Francisco Housing Authority; No other appearances.

RULING: DEFENDANTS PAMELA PALPALLATOC, JAMES GLEED, FRANCIS LAW, SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar as a duplicate entry. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-25-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Donnellan, Esq., 415.357.2099, for defendants Pamela Palpallatoc, James Gleed, Francis Law and San Francisco Housing Authority; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS PAMELA PALPALLATOC, JAMES GLEED, FRANCIS LAW, SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is granted with 15 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976
